@ prod-8-3:
(((4 + 7) - 8) * 8)
((4 + (7 - 8)) * 8)
(((4 - 8) + 7) * 8)
((4 - (8 - 7)) * 8)
(((7 + 4) - 8) * 8)
((7 + (4 - 8)) * 8)
(((7 - 8) + 4) * 8)
((7 - (8 - 4)) * 8)
(8 * ((4 + 7) - 8))
(8 * (4 + (7 - 8)))
(8 * ((4 - 8) + 7))
(8 * (4 - (8 - 7)))
(8 * ((7 + 4) - 8))
(8 * (7 + (4 - 8)))
(8 * ((7 - 8) + 4))
(8 * (7 - (8 - 4)))

@ prod-6-4:
(4 * (7 - (8 / 8)))
((7 - (8 / 8)) * 4)

@ sub:
((7 * 8) - (4 * 8))
((7 * 8) - (8 * 4))
((8 * 7) - (4 * 8))
((8 * 7) - (8 * 4))
